strategy_snapshot.topology: AI Interconnect Tax + Custom ASIC Dominance + VMware Cash Cow
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: XPU production scaling (Google/Meta) + VCF license conversion
strategy_snapshot.fragile_point: Valuation saturation at $2T market cap vs potential VMware churn
strategy_snapshot.core_thesis: 4.5% weight represents full conviction in the 2026 ASIC super-cycle. High cost basis ($372) requires tighter stop management than original entry.

deployment_plan.comment: Tight stop at $410 for recent add to lock in gains.

stop_loss_rules.macro_kill_switch: VMware Q2 renewal rate < 80% or HBM4 supply shortage impacts ASIC shipments
